heading: Approval of Secretary of Agriculture and Attorney General
label: 559f Approval of Secretary of Agriculture and Attorney General
text: The authorities conferred herein shall be exercised pursuant to an agreement approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and the Attorney General.
notes: References in TextHerein, referred to in text, probably means title XV of , , , known as the National Forest System Drug Control Act of 1986, which enacted sections 559b to 559f of this title, amended , Food and Drugs, and enacted provisions set out as a note under . For complete classification of title XV to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
